title: Did ETH close at or above $4,000 on the settlement date?
question: Did the price of ether (ETH/USD) close at or above $4,000.00 on March 31, 2026, as recorded by the Coinbridge ETH-USD Reference Rate at the 16:00 New York time settlement fixing?
